TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: === mami' === zik pqaniq ga mami' saku qba. 吃飯前我會洗手. sswe' maku kneril ga gs'un nya qmwax kyawan ru son nya phapuy mami'. . mami' trakis sozyan maku maniq kun. 我喜歡吃小米飯. qlihu na kacing hiya' ga mutu nha' galan qebu qap mami'. ikay mami' qasa niqun maku'. 把飯遞給我吃. tnaq su' niqun mami' qani? ini' ga, ini' su' ktnaq? 這飯夠不夠你吃? swali saku, ungat mami hiya, wayay nanak kya. . snkyan / skyun snkyan su' kyawan qasa lga? ppuyan maku' sehuy ga! wal nya' skyun qu thay mami' ru wal nya' ss'an huzil kwara'. .
S.PHON: === mamiʔ === zik pqaniq ɣa mamiʔ s~ɕaku qβa. *******. s~ɕs~ɕweʔ maku kneril ɣa ɣs~ɕʔun nja qmwax kjawan ru s~ɕon nja pħapuj mamiʔ. . mamiʔ trakis~ɕ s~ɕozjan maku maniq kun. *******. qliħu na kaʦ~ʨiŋ ħijaʔ ɣa mutu nħaʔ ɣalan qeβu qap mamiʔ. ikaj mamiʔ qas~ɕa niqun makuʔ. ******. tnaq s~ɕuʔ niqun mamiʔ qani? iniʔ ɣa, iniʔ s~ɕuʔ ktnaq? *******? s~ɕwali s~ɕaku, uŋat mami ħija, wajaj nanak kja. . s~ɕnkjan / s~ɕkjun s~ɕnkjan s~ɕuʔ kjawan qas~ɕa lɣa? ppujan makuʔ s~ɕeħuj ɣa! wal njaʔ s~ɕkjun qu tħaj mamiʔ ru wal njaʔ s~ɕs~ɕʔan ħuzil kwaraʔ. .
S.FORM: === mami' === zik pqaniq ga mami' saku qba. 吃飯前我會洗手. sswe' maku kneril ga gs'un nya qmwax kyawan ru son nya phapuy mami'. . mami' trakis sozyan maku maniq kun. 我喜歡吃小米飯. qlihu na kacing hiya' ga mutu nha' galan qebu qap mami'. ikay mami' qasa niqun maku'. 把飯遞給我吃. tnaq su' niqun mami' qani? ini' ga, ini' su' ktnaq? 這飯夠不夠你吃? swali saku, ungat mami hiya, wayay nanak kya. . snkyan / skyun snkyan su' kyawan qasa lga? ppuyan maku' sehuy ga! wal nya' skyun qu thay mami' ru wal nya' ss'an huzil kwara'. .
S.PHON: === mamiʔ === zik pqaniq ɣa mamiʔ s~ɕaku qβa. *******. s~ɕs~ɕweʔ maku kneril ɣa ɣs~ɕʔun nja qmwax kjawan ru s~ɕon nja pħapuj mamiʔ. . mamiʔ trakis~ɕ s~ɕozjan maku maniq kun. *******. qliħu na kaʦ~ʨiŋ ħijaʔ ɣa mutu nħaʔ ɣalan qeβu qap mamiʔ. ikaj mamiʔ qas~ɕa niqun makuʔ. ******. tnaq s~ɕuʔ niqun mamiʔ qani? iniʔ ɣa, iniʔ s~ɕuʔ ktnaq? *******? s~ɕwali s~ɕaku, uŋat mami ħija, wajaj nanak kja. . s~ɕnkjan / s~ɕkjun s~ɕnkjan s~ɕuʔ kjawan qas~ɕa lɣa? ppujan makuʔ s~ɕeħuj ɣa! wal njaʔ s~ɕkjun qu tħaj mamiʔ ru wal njaʔ s~ɕs~ɕʔan ħuzil kwaraʔ. .
